executives.name: James Dimon
executives.background: Mr. Dimon has been Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer since December 2005 and President since 2004. He was President and Chief Operating Officer from 2004 to 2005. He was Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Bank One Corporation from 2000 to 2004.

executives.name: Jeremy Barnum
executives.background: Mr. Barnum has been Chief Financial Officer since May 2021. He previously served as Head of Global Research for the Corporate & Investment Bank from 2021 to 2021 and as Chief Financial Officer of the Corporate & Investment Bank from 2013 to 2021.

tenure_dates.title: Head of Global Research, Corporate & Investment Bank

executives.name: Daniel Pinto
executives.background: Mr. Pinto has been President and Chief Operating Officer since January 2022. He was Co-President and Co-Chief Operating Officer from 2018 to 2021 and CEO of the Corporate & Investment Bank from 2014 to 2024.

tenure_dates.title: President and Chief Operating Officer (formerly Vice Chairman)

executives.name: Mary Erdoes
executives.background: Ms. Erdoes has been CEO of Asset & Wealth Management since 2009. She joined the firm in 1996 and has held various senior roles in the asset management business.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Executive Officer, Asset & Wealth Management

executives.name: Marianne Lake
executives.background: Ms. Lake has been CEO of Consumer & Community Banking since 2024. She was Co-CEO of Consumer & Community Banking from 2021 to 2024 and CEO of Consumer Lending from 2019 to 2021. She served as CFO of the firm from 2013 to 2019.

tenure_dates.title: CEO, Consumer & Community Banking (and various prior senior executive roles within the firm)

executives.name: Jennifer Piepszak
executives.background: Ms. Piepszak has been Co-CEO of the Commercial & Investment Bank since 2024. She was Co-CEO of Consumer & Community Banking from 2021 to 2024 and CFO of the firm from 2019 to 2021.

executives.name: Alex Gorsky
executives.background: Mr. Gorsky is the former Chairman and CEO of Johnson & Johnson, where he served as Chairman and CEO from 2012 to 2021 and Executive Chairman in 2022.

tenure_dates.title: Director (Member of the Board of Directors)

executives.name: Alicia Boler Davis
executives.background: CEO of Alto Pharmacy. Former Senior Vice President of Global Customer Fulfillment at Amazon.

executives.name: Brad Smith
executives.background: President of Marshall University and former Chairman and CEO of Intuit Inc.

executives.name: Claire McDonough
executives.background: Ms. McDonough has served as our Chief Financial Officer since January 2021. Prior to joining Rivian, Ms. McDonough was a Managing Director at J.P. Morgan, where she held various leadership roles in the Investment Bank from 2014 to 2021. She holds a B.A. in Public Policy and Economics from Duke University and an M.B.A. from the University of Chicago Booth School of Business.

tenure_dates.title: Managing Director, Co-Head of Disruptive Commerce

executives.name: David Cote
executives.background: David Cote is the Executive Chairman of the Board of Vertiv. He is the former Chairman and CEO of Honeywell. He also served as a Class B Director to the Federal Reserve Bank of New York.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: James Crown
executives.background: Chairman and CEO of Henry Crown and Company. (Note: Deceased June 2023, but listed in 2023 proxy).

executives.name: James Hongdi Gu
executives.background: Dr. Gu has served as our vice chairman since March 2018. Prior to joining us, Dr. Gu was a managing director and the chairman of J.P. Morgan Chase Asia Pacific Investment Banking.

tenure_dates.title: Managing Director and Chairman of Asia Pacific Investment Banking

executives.name: Jonathan Simon
executives.background: Senior Vice President and General Counsel of Van Eck Associates Corporation since 2014.

executives.name: Linda Bammann
executives.background: Retired Deputy Head of Risk Management at JPMorgan Chase. Former Vice Chair of Bank One Corporation.

executives.name: Mellody Hobson
executives.background: Co-CEO and President of Ariel Investments, LLC. Chair of Starbucks Corporation.

executives.name: Michael Neal
executives.background: Retired Vice Chairman of General Electric Company and former Chairman and CEO of GE Capital.

executives.name: Phebe Novakovic
executives.background: Ms. Novakovic has been Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of General Dynamics since January 2013. Previously, she served as President and Chief Operating Officer from May 2012 to December 2012 and as Executive Vice President, Marine Systems, from May 2010 to May 2012.

executives.name: Stephen Burke
executives.background: Former CEO of NBCUniversal and former COO of Comcast Corporation.

executives.name: Timothy Flynn
executives.background: Retired Chairman of KPMG International.

executives.name: Todd Combs
executives.background: Investment Officer at Berkshire Hathaway Inc. and CEO of GEICO.

executives.name: Virginia Rometty
executives.background: Former Chairman, President and CEO of IBM.
